steps.subject: Storm damage to your garage door? We can help today.
steps.body:
Hi {first_name},

I'm Tal with Goldman's Garage Door Repair in {city}. After the recent storm in {county}, we're reaching out to homeowners who may have garage door damage.

Storms bend panels, snap springs, knock doors off their tracks, and damage openers. If your garage door took a hit, here's what we can do:

- Free damage assessment — we come out and look at no charge
- Insurance covers most storm damage, and we work with adjusters directly
- Same-day emergency service to secure your garage if the door is stuck open

Don't wait on this one — an unsecured garage is a safety issue and can lead to more damage if another storm rolls through.

Call or text me directly and we'll get someone out to you today.

Tal Goldman
Goldman's Garage Door Repair
{phone}

steps.subject: Re: Storm damage check for your garage door in {city}
steps.body:
Hey {first_name},

Just following up — if your garage door was damaged in the recent storm, the sooner you get it looked at, the easier the insurance process is. Fresh documentation with photos and a detailed estimate makes claims go smoothly.

We handle the paperwork side too — adjuster-ready estimates with itemized pricing and photos. Most homeowners don't realize their policy covers garage door storm damage.

The free assessment offer still stands. Give me a call or reply to this email and we'll schedule a visit.

Tal Goldman
Goldman's Garage Door Repair
{phone}

notes: Send from MI number for MI leads, NC number for NC leads. URGENT campaign — triggered by weather_monitor.py storm alerts. Time-sensitive, send within 24 hours of storm event. Only 2 steps because urgency diminishes quickly.
